message:
beads: enrich Phase 1 beads with full content from plan (vqr, ik6)

- meta_skill-vqr: Complete Robot Mode output schemas (RobotResponse,
  StatusResponse, SuggestResponse, BuildStatusResponse, error format)
- meta_skill-ik6: Complete SkillSpec data model (Skill, SkillSpec,
  SkillMetadata, SkillSlice, SlicePredicate, SkillEvidenceIndex,
  UncertaintyItem, PackContract)
